# [LinuxOS] latexmkrc

```default
# -------------------------------------------------------
# Linux / Ubuntu LaTeX workflow (latexmk config)
# -------------------------------------------------------

# Use PDF output mode
$pdf_mode = 1;

# Prefer modern engine (recommended for Linux academic writing)
# Options:
#   pdflatex (safe default)
#   lualatex (better Unicode + fonts)
#   xelatex (good for system fonts)
$pdflatex = 'pdflatex -synctex=1 -interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error';

# Alternative modern engines (uncomment if needed):
# $pdflatex = 'lualatex -synctex=1 -interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error';
# $pdflatex = 'xelatex  -synctex=1 -interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error';

# Bibliography support (BibTeX / BibLaTeX auto-handling)
$bibtex_use = 1;

# Auto-run bibliography tools when needed
$bibtex = 'bibtex %O %S';

# Continuous preview mode (useful for Emacs + Zathura workflow)
$preview_continuous_mode = 1;

# Enable SyncTeX for Emacs + Zathura forward/back search
$synctex = 1;

# Clean auxiliary files automatically (Linux-friendly project hygiene)
$clean_ext = "aux bbl blg fls fdb_latexmk log run.xml synctex.gz";

# Improve error handling for large academic documents
$max_repeat = 5;
```
